title: Rajkumar
writer: Sudarshan Babbar, Manmohan Desai, A.L. Narayanan
actors: Shammi Kapoor, Sadhana Shivdasani, Pran Sikand
plot: Prince Bhanu Pratap returns from a decade in a foreign country, together with his friend Kapil. His father, the King (Raja)has married again after Bhanu Pratap's mother passed away, and has a son by his new wife Maharani (Queen) K...
